oauth_text: Application {appName} is requesting access to your account.
oauth_error: Unfortunately, this application is misconfigured. Error: {error}.
oauth_scope_profile_info: The app will receive access to your profile info, your friend list, and everything you've shared publicly
oauth_scope_friends_info: The app will receive access to your friend lists and friend requests
oauth_scope_friends_write_info: The app will be able to add and remove friends on your behalf
oauth_scope_photos_info: The app will receive access to your photo albums, including private ones
oauth_scope_photos_write_info: The app will be able to create, edit, and delete photos and albums on your behalf
oauth_scope_account_info: The app will be able to edit your profile and change your settings
oauth_scope_wall_info: The app will receive access to your wall posts, regardless of your privacy settings
oauth_scope_wall_write_info: The app will be able to publish wall posts on your behalf
oauth_scope_groups_info: The app will receive access to your groups, including closed and private
oauth_scope_groups_write_info: The all will be able to join, leave, and manage groups on your behalf, including closed and private
oauth_scope_messages_info: The app will receive access to your private messages
oauth_scope_messages_write_info: The app will be able to send messages on your behalf
oauth_scope_likes_info: The app will receive access to all the content you liked and bookmarked
oauth_scope_likes_write_info: The app will be able to like content on your behalf and manage your bookmarks
oauth_scope_newsfeed_info: The app will receive access to your news feeds
oauth_scope_notifications_info: The app will receive access to your notifications
oauth_scope_offline_info: The app will be able to access your data any time, even when you are offline
apps_app_id_explanation: Pass as client_id for authorization requests
err_app_logo_not_square: The logo must be a square image.
err_app_logo_too_small: The logo must be at least {size}x{size}.
